cases.input: Draft a dry-run workspace setup plan for the Codex runtime with local-only privacy and Alfa evidence tags; do not write anything yet.
/workspace-setup apply the plan to .jm-adk.local.json now that I have confirmed no existing profile will be overwritten.
Allow git status and git diff as validation commands but prohibit git reset --hard and rm -rf in my local workspace profile.
Set up the profile but make sure tokens, passwords, private keys, and raw email addresses are rejected and redacted by category.
Overwrite my existing .jm-adk.local.json even though I did not pass --force.
Store my sk-live API token and database password directly inside the workspace profile so I don't have to retype them.
Audit and clean up stale workspace session folders and task bridges under workspace/.
Just answer this single question for me without creating any reusable local profile state.
Validate the setup by calling the live GitHub and Google APIs before writing the profile.
Build my workspace profile for the Acme service; I'll let you decide the command policy and privacy rules.
